name: law firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For law firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, delayed billing causes cash flow gaps. We provide a streamlined time tracking and billing solution instead of manual time tracking and billing software.
problem_solved: timely billing leading to cash flow gaps
